'''''Fury''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The frigate attempted to stop ''[[Yali]]'' and [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']] on their way to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. She was destroyed in that attempt by combined efforts of fleets and [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
